name: nCino, Inc.
summary: PART I Overview As employees at financial institutions (FIs) do their daily work and serve their clients, they often face inefficiencies from disparate systems, broken workflows, manual processes, and the inability to utilize their data effectively. This negatively impacts risk management, decision making, and the experiences of bankers and their clients. FIs need a unified platform that helps them reengineer every experience, from managing complex credit portfolios to streamlining account onboa...
